calendar.matters:
Plaintiff City And County Of San Francisco, A Municipal Corporation'S Motion For Assignment Order
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Debra D. Lew, Esq., Assistant Tax Collector Attorney, Tel. 415.554.7888, for plaintiff and moving party;
Che L. Hashim, Esq., Tel. 415.487.1700, appearing specially for defendant.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Assignment Order is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion For Assignment Order
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Arvind Patel, Tel. 415.601.5001, as PMK of Saint Francis Marine Center, Inc.;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The court vacated its tentative ruling and PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION'S Motion For Assignment Order is continued to January 24, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give the defendant the opportunity to seek counsel. Mr. Patel shall notify plaintiff of the new hearing date by letter and shall bring a copy of that letter to court on the hearing day. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Discharged

Notice To Defendant And Judgment Debtor To Appear And Produce Documents
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Text Ruling
